movie.actors: Halle Berry, Benjamin Bratt, Sharon Stone, Lambert Wilson
movie.plot: A shy woman, endowed with the speed, reflexes, and senses of a cat, walks a thin line between criminal and hero, even as a detective doggedly pursues her, fascinated by both of her personas.
movie.title: Catwoman
movie.writer: Bob Kane (characters), Theresa Rebeck (story), John Brancato (story), Michael Ferris (story), John Brancato (screenplay), Michael Ferris (screenplay), John Rogers (screenplay)
